script: APP_ID=e6e0f8dd-411a-485d-8d93-39149cb84204; TENANT=50186224-2255-444a-b321-60a84114115c; az bot create --resource-group SDNeurosurgery-OpenClaw --name OpenClaw-JesusReyesClaude --app-type SingleTenant --appid $APP_ID --tenant-id $TENANT --endpoint 'https://openclaw-sdneuro.westus2.cloudapp.azure.com/jesus-reyes/api/messages' --sku F0 --description "Jesus Reyes' Personal Claude Agent" 2>&1 | head -30; echo "rc=$?"; echo; echo '===== Verify endpoint set =====' && az resource show --resource-group SDNeurosurgery-OpenClaw --resource-type Microsoft.BotService/botServices --name OpenClaw-JesusReyesClaude --query 'properties.endpoint' -o tsv 2>&1
